# framer-templates — LICENSE & SOURCING NOTE

**Scrape date:** 2026-04-21
**Operator:** Regan Cooney (regacooney@gmail.com) — UK reseller, internal non-commercial use

## What is in this directory

- `previews/` — 6 PNG screenshots of publicly accessible framer.com/marketplace/templates detail pages.
- `recreated/` — 10 authored HTML structural approximations of landing-page patterns visible in the previews (hero + feature grid + stat strip + footer patterns).
- `metadata.json` — per-template catalogue: designer, designer_profile, source_url, live_preview, price, categories, features, pages_count, visual_tags.
- `INDEX.md` — ranked top-10 for Clawmachine-fit.

## Source access note

Framer exports compiled static HTML via the `<slug>.framer.website` public preview URL — source code is NOT exposed. The `recreated/*.html` files in this directory are authored from what is visible in the preview images; no source code was extracted or copied. The recreations use a generic dark-marketing-page grammar (gradient hero, 3-column feature grid, compiled-landing footer) that is neither novel nor copyrightable in the abstract.

## Licence posture

- Captured PNGs: public-facing marketing-page screenshots, credited to named designer, retained for internal research reference only.
- Authored HTML: original structural approximations. No Framer-proprietary component code. No verbatim copy text.
- This directory is NOT a Framer project export, NOT redistributable, NOT licensed for any commercial use.

## Fair-use basis

UK fair-dealing for non-commercial research. Operator is the sole viewer. If a Framer designer asks for their preview to be removed, contact regacooney@gmail.com.

## Anti-claims

- No Framer designer endorsed these recreations.
- No Framer marketplace licence is implied or transferred by what is in this folder.
- To actually use a Framer template in production: purchase from framer.com/marketplace under the designer's licence terms.
